title: J2CL stays the default root while the legacy GWT rollback path is restored
summary: Operators can keep the J2CL root shell on `/` by default while still serving the legacy `/webclient/**` assets and flipping `/` back to the GWT bootstrap through the restored rollback control plane.

items: Restored the `j2cl-root-bootstrap` control plane so fresh installs stay on the J2CL root shell by default but operators can set `ui.j2cl_root_bootstrap_enabled=false` to roll `/` back to the legacy GWT bootstrap
Put `/webclient/webclient.nocache.js` back into the packaged runtime and local smoke checks so rollback mode remains deployable without a code revert
